data.description:
## What

Add a CI job that runs an end-to-end rebar CLI golden path
(install → init → create → ready → claim → close) in a throwaway git repo, so the
quickstart's commands can never silently rot again. This is the core
maintenance-burden reducer for the P0 defects.

Reuse, do not re-author: `scripts/probe-rebar.sh` already exercises the full CLI
surface end-to-end against the real engine in an isolated temp `REBAR_ROOT`. This
ticket wires it (or a trimmed init→create→ready→claim→close subset that mirrors the
README quickstart) into CI as a gating job.

- Add the job to `.github/workflows/test.yml` (CI's source of truth), invoking the
  existing probe script.
- Ensure it runs on a clean install of the package so it also catches
  packaging/entry-point regressions.
- Keep it fast and hermetic (temp dir, no network, no shared state).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A CI job runs the golden-path probe and FAILS the build if any of
      init/create/ready/claim/close changes exit code or expected output.
- [ ] The job runs against an installed rebar (not just `src` on `PYTHONPATH`).
- [ ] A deliberately broken quickstart command is demonstrably caught by the job
      (note the manual verification in a comment).

Files: `.github/workflows/test.yml`, `scripts/probe-rebar.sh`.
data.title: P0: Wire the existing golden-path probe into CI
